name: ads
description: When the user wants help with paid advertising campaigns on Google Ads, Meta (Facebook/Instagram), LinkedIn, Twitter/X, or other ad platforms. Also use when the user mentions 'PPC,' 'paid media,' 'ROAS,' 'CPA,' 'ad campaign,' 'retargeting,' 'audience targeting,' 'Google Ads,' 'Facebook ads,' 'LinkedIn ads,' 'ad budget,' 'cost per click,' 'ad spend,' or 'should I run ads.' Use this for campaign strategy, audience targeting, bidding, and optimization. For bulk ad creative generation and iteration,
author: coreyhaines31
summary_zh: 这是一款跨平台广告投放助手，专门帮你解决各大平台的广告策略、人群定向、出价优化和批量生成素材的难题，适合想提升投放回报或不知如何起步的商家。
